series_metadata.series_description: Pursuant to OAC 3746-3-04. Contains all documents filed and issued in each specific case on appeal before the Board.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Case file is maintained for 5 years after the case has been closed. Case files are destroyed after required time has lapsed. ; Electronic: Case file is maintained for 5 years after the case has been closed. Case files are destroyed after required time has lapsed., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
